question_text: Post-nasal drip sensation or frequent throat clearing?
Recent exposure to COVID/flu or sick contacts?
Recent travel or blood clot risk (DVT/PE risk)?
Using rescue inhaler more than every 4 hours?
Ever hospitalized or intubated for asthma?
Chest pain that is worse with breathing (pleuritic)?
Confusion or new mental status change?
Known COPD/asthma/CHF or chronic lung disease?
Recent antibiotic use in last 30 days?
Severe weakness or cannot keep fluids down?
Chest pain + fever + shortness of breath together?
